description: Add persistent notification inbox controls and filtering.

userStories.title: Persist notification read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want notification read state stored between sessions so that read and unread choices remain consistent when I return.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification storage tracks whether each notification is read or unread
Existing notifications default to unread unless marked otherwise
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Expose notification read state in shared data
userStories.description: As a developer, I want notification list responses to include read state so that UI surfaces can render unread indicators consistently.
acceptanceCriteria: Notification API responses include read-state information for each notification
Shared notification types represent read and unread values consistently
Typecheck passes
Tests pass

userStories.title: Show unread badge entry point
userStories.description: As a user, I want an unread badge on the notification entry point so that I can tell when new notifications need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: The notification entry point shows an unread count badge when unread items exist
The badge count updates after notification read state changes
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Open notification list surface
userStories.description: As a user, I want to open a notification list so that I can review my recent notifications in one place.
acceptanceCriteria: Users can open a notification center list from the notification entry point
The list shows notifications with visible read or unread state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Mark notifications read or unread
userStories.description: As a user, I want to mark individual notifications read or unread so that I can manage which items still need attention.
acceptanceCriteria: Each notification supports toggling between read and unread states
Changing read state persists immediately and updates visible unread indicators
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter notifications by read state
userStories.description: As a user, I want to filter notifications by read state so that I can focus on unread work or review completed items.
acceptanceCriteria: The notification center exposes All, Unread, and Read filters
Selecting a filter shows only notifications matching the chosen read state
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Clear all read notifications
userStories.description: As a user, I want to clear all read notifications so that completed items stop cluttering the notification center.
acceptanceCriteria: The notification center exposes an action to clear all read notifications
Clearing read notifications removes only notifications already marked read
Typecheck passes
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
